SUIT
++++
M/V AB Bonita\'11  33,811 DWT - GRENAA  JAN 2/5
++++++++++++++
MV AB BONITA, PANAMA FLAG
IMO NO.9480564
CLASSIFICATION : KR
BUILT: 2011, 21ST CENTURY SHIP BUILDING, KOREA
DWT 33,810.8 MT ON 9.927M SSW
GRT/NRT: 23322 / 11202A
L.O.A 181M / L.B.P 172M/ BREADTH 30M/ DEPTH 14.8M
CRANS 4 X 30 MT
GRAIN CAP. 47558 CUBM/ BALE CAP. 45180 CUBM.
5 HO/HA
HATCH DIMENSIONS: NO.1: 16,80 M X 15,00 M;  NO.2 ~ NO.5 : 20,80 M X 21,00 M.
SPEED / CONSUMPTION ( ECO SPEED ONLY)
(L)ABT 11,50 KT ON ABT 21,50 MT IFO 380 CST + 0,20 MT MGO
(B)ABT 12,00 KT ON ABT 21,50 MT IFO 380 CST + 0,20 MT MGO
IDLE : 2.50 MT IFO 380 CST + 0.2 MT MGO (BOILER)
WORKING : 4.00 IFO 380 CST + 0.2 MT MGO (BOILER)
ALL ABOVE BASED ON CLEAN BOTTOM, GOOD WEATHER CONDITION
B/SCALE 4/DSS 3, AND NO ADVERSE CURRENT, AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL.
VESSEL CONSUMES MGO MAY BE INCREASED WHEN TRADING AT VERY LOW OR HIGH SEA TEMPERATURES ALL DETAILS ABOUT AND GIVEN IN GOOD FAITH ANY SAVING IN CONSUMPTION MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST ANY SPEED UNDERPERFORMANCE, ANY SAVING IN TIME MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST ANY EXCESS CONSUMPTION, ANY SAVING IN FO MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST INCREASED MDO AND VICE VERSA, AND ANY OVERALL SAVING ON INDIVIDUAL PASSAGE(S) MUST BE SET OFF AGAINST AN OVERALL LOSS ON OTHER INDIVIDUAL PASSAGE(S).
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION IS BASIS ACTUAL “GOOD WEATHER” PERIODS DEFINED AS: MAX WIND FORCE BEAUFORT SCALE 4 DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3  WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENTS AND WITH WATER DEPTH EXCEEDING 8 TIMES THE VESSELS DRAFT. FAVORABLE CURRENTS NOT TO BE FACTORED IN WHEN ASSESSING VESSEL’S PERFORMANCE. ONLY VOYAGES EXCEEDING 48 HOURS TRANSIT TIME FROM SEA PILOT TO SEA PILOT - EXCLUDING A PERIOD OF 12HRS AFTER COSP/PRIOR EOSP - ARE TO BE TAKEN INTO ACCOUNT WHEN ASSESSING VESSEL’S PERFORMANCE. PASSAGES WITH RESTRICTED VISIBILITY AND/OR WHEN NAVIGATING IN CONGESTED WATERS, STRAITS, NARROW WATERS AND/OR WHILE FOLLOWING SLOW STEAM INSTRUCTIONS, AND/OR MANEUVERING, ENTERING, OR LEAVING PORTS ARE TO BE EXCLUDED. FOR A STEAMING PERIOD TO BE CONSIDERED A GOOD WEATHER ONE, ALL TIME FROM NOON-TO-NOON (24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS) HAS TO BE IN GOOD WEATHER AS DEFINED ABOVE. EXTRAPOLATION OF “GOOD WEATHER” PERFORMANCE FOR “BAD WEATHER” PERIODS IS NOT ALLOWED. ABOUT TO MEAN PLUS OR MINUS 0.5 KNOTS ON THE SPEED FIGURES AND PLUS OR MINUS 5% ON THE CONSUMPTION FIGURES BOTH IN OWNER’S FAVOR.
THE VESSEL SHALL HAVE THE LIBERTY TO USE MDO/MGO FOR MANEUVERING IN/OUT OF PORTS, STARTING OF A/E, NAVIGATING IN SHALLOW/ RESTRICTED/ BUSY WATERS, CANAL, AND RIVERS. GENERATOR ENGINES TO CONSUME DIESEL OIL IN CASE OF PART LOAD. WHEN VESSEL IS PERFORMING BALLAST WATER TREATMENT, MANEUVERING ON DEPARTURE/ARRIVAL, BALLASTING/DEBALLASTING EXCHANGE AND HOLDS CLEANING WHILE AT SEA OR PORT THE TOTAL CONSUMPTION OF THE VESSEL WILL BE INCREASED BY ABT 5 MT. CHARTERERS ARE NOT ENTITLED TO RETAIN ANY AMOUNTS FROM HIRE PAYMENTS IN CONNECTION WITH ALLEGED PERFORMANCE CLAIMS.
ANY CLAIMS DUE TO ALLEGED UNDER PERFORMANCE OF THE VESSEL MUST BE NOTIFIED TO OWNERS VIA EMAIL WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM COMPLETION OF DISCHARGING CARGO, OTHERWISE OWNERS CONSIDER NO CLAIMS FROM CHARTERERS AND OWNERS WILL NOT BE HELD RESPONSIBLE FOR SUCH CLAIMS.
ALL DETAILS ABOUT GIVEN IN GOOD FAITH, EXCEPT SPEED/CONSUMPTION FIGURES WHICH DESCRIBED AS ABOUT ONLY.
Best Regards
George Toumpas
